title: fix x assign vs init randomization
body:
When adding `x` randomization stability I was confused about `t_x_assign*`:
https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/5958#discussion_r2073919941

This is because I was missing the fact that `VerilatedContext::randReset()` is only supposed to influence --x-initial behavior and not --x-assign.  In my earlier PR I made it so that `randReset()` alters the randomization of both of these which is a departure from earlier behavior and not what the docs say will happen:
https://verilator.org/guide/latest/exe_sim.html?highlight=rand#cmdoption-arg-verilator-rand-reset-value

This restores the old behavior while preserving the random stability.
